gaps: Live kind rollout and HTTP smoke were not run in this review; verification used OpenSpec validation, fixture tests, syntax checks, diff whitespace checks, and kustomize rendering.

summary: Accept. The integration branch conforms to the approved update-web-app OpenSpec artifacts, including the repaired web app Kubernetes readiness model and read-only RBAC. The backend preserves MCP-aligned structured fields for spec-round progress, artifacts, OpenSpec validation, blockers, warnings, final-review outcomes, and event/detail views; kustomize includes the web app Deployment, Service, ServiceAccount, Role, and RoleBinding; lifecycle tasks, smoke wiring, and operator docs include the web app. No blocking issues were found.
